response.global_summary: The video is a 3D animated project starring Hololive VTuber Gigi Murin. It features a musical performance involving other Hololive members, followed by an extended comedic skit. The song appears to be an original production for this specific video, and as such, lacks a formal, widely recognized title or external lyric archive.
